# Thrive Real Estate Brokers — Join Thrive

> Thrive Real Estate Brokers is a boutique, independent real estate brokerage in Greenville, South Carolina, serving the greater Upstate. This site helps experienced, licensed agents decide where to hang or move their real estate license. Thrive offers a 90/10 commission split with a low $12,000 annual company-dollar cap (100% after the cap), a flat $125 per month covering E&O insurance and technology, no franchise fees or desk fees, and hands-on broker support on every deal.

## Who it is for
Experienced, licensed real estate agents in Greenville and the Upstate of South Carolina who want to keep more of their commission and work directly with their broker instead of being one name on a large franchise roster.

## The commission model
- 90/10 split until Thrive collects $12,000 in company dollar for the year, then the agent keeps 100%.
- A flat $250 per-transaction fee applies only after the $12,000 cap is reached.
- A flat $125 per month covers E&O insurance and the full technology stack. No desk fees, no franchise royalties.
- The cap resets annually. There is no penalty or clawback in a slow year.

## Moving your license
Agents transfer an active South Carolina real estate license to Thrive. Alesha Oppatt, the Broker-in-Charge, has made the move herself and walks every agent through the paperwork with the South Carolina Real Estate Commission. Most transfers take only a few days.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://joinus.thriverealestatebrokers.com/): overview and earnings calculator
- [Why Thrive](https://joinus.thriverealestatebrokers.com/why-thrive/): why experienced agents move
- [The Split](https://joinus.thriverealestatebrokers.com/the-split/): the commission model explained
- [Making the Move](https://joinus.thriverealestatebrokers.com/making-the-move/): how to transfer your license
- [Meet the Broker](https://joinus.thriverealestatebrokers.com/meet-the-broker/): about Alesha Oppatt, Broker-in-Charge
- [FAQ](https://joinus.thriverealestatebrokers.com/faq/): common questions agents ask
- [Contact](https://joinus.thriverealestatebrokers.com/contact/): start a confidential conversation

## About the broker
Alesha Oppatt is the Broker-in-Charge and owner of Thrive Real Estate Brokers, based in Greenville, South Carolina. The main brokerage site is https://thriverealestatebrokers.com.
